Closes #

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Refactor / internal
- [ ] Docs
- [ ] Other:

## Checklist

- [ ] `go test ./...` (each Go module) and `npm test` (gqlkit-ts) pass; `gofmt` + `go vet` clean
- [ ] Added/updated tests where it makes sense
- [ ] Generator/template changes verified by regenerating the examples
- [ ] Updated the affected artifact's `CHANGELOG.md` for user-facing changes
- [ ] No unrelated changes or formatting churn
